title: Where Do Dreams Go
poem_text:
Why do stars blink when they say goodnight?
Do they whisper to the moon so bright?
Can a raindrop hold a secret tune?
Does it sing it to the sun at noon?
Where do echoes hide when they’re not heard?
Do they curl up like a sleeping bird?
If the wind could write, what would it say?
Would it tell us where the dreams all stay?
cover_context: A child lying in bed, watching stars blink through the window while soft echoes and whispers drift like fireflies in the dark.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, acoustic guitar and lo-fi beat, 100 BPM, soft and settling, warm steady rhythm, almost a lullaby, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
